content.en:
After breaking through to the sixth bone transformation realm, there were not enough source stones on Ye Tian's body.

It's not that his contribution value is not enough, but that there are not enough source stones on the other side of Gu Heng Mountain!

The number of source stones on the other side is still very rare, that is, the number of source stones on the other side is extremely rare, so for the geniuses on the other side, the reserves of the source stones on the other side are quite okay and sufficient.

But.

Gu Heng Mountain also had another genius at the other side, so almost all of the reserves were exchanged by the other party.

Therefore, Ye Tian was now unable to exchange more source stones from Gu Heng Mountain.

Of course.

He was also asking many envoys and inspectors of Gu Heng Mountain to find the source stone on the other side, otherwise it would be a little difficult to find it if he relied on himself to find it slowly.

"I have to cultivate the Eternal Giant Ape Vest and become a genius on the other side, so that I can get more source stones from the True Beast Alliance!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The True Beast Alliance currently does not have a genius at the other side, so if he becomes a genius at the other side, coupled with the background of Jun Zu, I am afraid that the entire True Beast Alliance's other side source stone will be obtained by him.

When the time comes, he can evenly copy the body of the real body, and there will be no shortage of source stones on the other side.

this day.

Ye Tian's Eternal Giant Ape Vest began to study the magic skills of the other side with the help of Jun Zu.

This is also what Junzu asked.

If you say that your research has been successful without going through Jun Zu, you will definitely be suspicious.

Therefore, he had to go through this process.

Junzu's palace.

Ye Tian began to study the art of creating supernatural powers on the other side, and deliberately failed to do so.

Rumble!!!

His body began to crack, a sign that his flesh was about to crumble.

But suddenly.

A golden ball appeared in Jun Zu's hand, releasing a golden light that hit his body, stabilizing his body.

"Rest for a few primeval eras, and then come to me to continue cultivating!"

Jun Zu said.

"Yes, Master!"

Ye Tian's vest left.

Obviously, Jun Zu asked him to come to cultivate every few primeval eras.

In this way, even if tens of thousands of primeval epochs can't be practiced, then hundreds of thousands, millions, or even tens of millions of primeval epoch years.

For an existence like Jun Zu, even if it is tens of millions of primeval eras, it is not a very long time.

Of course.

Ye Tian, this primeval era, would not really cultivate tens of millions of primeval eras, and then become a genius on the other side.

"After waiting for hundreds of primeval eras, in front of the real Jun Ancestor, show the magic of the other side - the golden mangs of the other side!"

Ye Tian decided.

As for his real body replicating body and the same magic technique on the other side used in the vest, this is not a problem, there are more magic skills on the other side in the future, as long as you don't use the same magic power on the other side, you won't be suspicious of your identity.

And.

It was the real Jun Zu's face research that created the magic power on the other side, and Jun Zu only thought that his luck was against the sky, and he would not have other ideas.

Time flies, time passes slowly.

Somewhere in the land of eternity.

The Lord of the Ruins is on the run.

Over the years, the Lord of the Ruins has been roaming the land of eternity, encountering many dangers, and his life has been very miserable, but he has survived.

This time, he finally met the opportunity and successfully broke through to the Boundary-Breaking Genius of the Sixth Bone Transformation Realm.

However, he offended a force - the Blood Kun Clan!

The Blood Kun Clan is a Blood Transformation Realm race, and its strength is naturally extremely powerful, and it is an existence that the Lord of the Ruins does not dare to provoke.

Therefore, after offending the Blood Kun Clan, he didn't dare to stay in the land of eternity at all, and fled back towards the territorial sea boundary as fast as possible.

After returning to the territorial sea boundary rift, he has hope of survival!

"The Blood Kun Clan is too domineering, that treasure is what I got, and it is mine when I snatch it, they came one step late, surrounded me, and I killed several clansmen. Now, they're here to kill me!"

He felt helpless.

But there was no way, after that treasure was swallowed, it directly allowed him to break through the realm.

Such a treasure, he could not have let it.

The only thing I didn't expect was that the Blood Kun Clan's movements were too fast.

Escape!

Escape!

Escape!

The Lord of the Ruins is desperately fleeing for his life, but the Blood Kun Clan who is chasing after him from the rear is very strong.

There are more than a dozen boundary-breaking geniuses in the sixth-time bone transformation realm, and there are also more than a dozen ordinary seventh-time bone transformation realms, and there is even a boundary-breaking genius in the seventh-time bone transformation realm.

With such a large chasing team, if he was caught up, he would die directly.

So.

He can only use one escape treasure after another, and use them when the other party is about to catch up, so as to distance himself.

Abrupt.

An arrow shot out of nothingness, piercing his body.

However.

He didn't dare to stop at all, and continued to shuttle.

He knew very well that this was an attack from the Blood Kun Clan, so he could only drag his injuries and continue to escape, once he stopped to heal, he would be dead.

"It's almost time to reach the territorial sea boundary seam, this group of guys shouldn't dare to go into the territorial sea boundary seam!"

The Lord of the Ruins thought to himself.

Just when the other party was about to catch up again, the Lord of the Ruins finally arrived at the boundary gap of the territorial waters.

"Hahaha, it's finally back!"

"I'm the master of the ruins, I still have luck!"

He sensed the passage, and then shuttled into the passage for the first time, returning to the boundary gap of the territorial waters.

......

Territorial sea boundary seam.

The Lord of the Ruins returned, and after all the Heavenly Ancestors sensed it, they appeared one after another.

"Lord of the Ruins, you're finally back!"

They hurriedly said.

And the Lord of the Ruins didn't have time to catch up with them, and destroy this passage as soon as possible.

With this passageway, it is easier for them to get in.

Of course, they wouldn't necessarily come in, but he didn't want to keep the passageway.

Click!!

The passage was destroyed.

"Lord of the Ruins, what are you doing here?" asked the Lord of Bones.

"I've offended a faction, so destroy this passage!" said the Lord of the Ruins.

"What, offended the forces!"

These bone transformations are all terrified.

They could see that the Lord of the Chaos had broken through to the Sixth Bone Transformation Realm, and even the Lord of the Chaos of this realm had to flee back, and the offended force must be terrifying!

If the other party comes in, won't it bring disaster to them?

Seeing that these bone transformation realms were frightened, the Lord of the Ruins said: "Don't worry, the suppression of the external bone transformation realm by the territorial sea boundary crack like ours is very strong, and they don't dare to enter here casually." Otherwise, under the suppression of strength, I can easily kill them. "

"That's good!"

They breathed a sigh of relief.

Outside the boundary of the territorial waters.

The group of bone transformation realms of the Blood Kun Clan came to the territorial sea boundary rift, and they stopped one after another, staring at the territorial sea boundary rift, and did not enter it for the first time.
